title: 3Powers context budget (context.yaml)
description: Advisory per-model context budget used to size implementation phases. A phase whose estimated reload set exceeds the budget only gets a split warning; it is never a gate, verdict, or advance input.

budget_tokens.description: Default budget in tokens when no per-model entry matches (default ~110000).

models.description: Optional per-model overrides. The key is the role's configured model id (roles.yaml); the value is that model's budget in tokens.
